<!-- politty:command:build:start -->

# build

Build the project

**Usage**

```
my-cli build [options]
```

> Note: builds are incremental by default.

**Options**

| Option    | Alias | Description       | Required | Default |
| --------- | ----- | ----------------- | -------- | ------- |
| `--watch` | `-w`  | Watch for changes | No       | `false` |

<!-- politty:command:build:end -->
